response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks clear evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams beyond 10 people, or designing financial risk/credit systems — key requirements for a CTO role in this domain.
strengths: Exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven experience with event-driven systems and real-time data pipelines
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
concerns: No demonstrable leadership of engineering teams larger than 10 people
Lacks explicit experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulatory compliance
No evidence of architecting model-agnostic, auditable multi-agent systems in production
